headline: Assessing Conagra Brands (CAG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Conagra Brands (CAG) is on investors’ radar today Conagra Brands (CAG) has drawn fresh attention after a period of weaker share performance, including a 9.5% decline over the past month and a 20.2% decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Conagra Brands. At a share price of $14.23, Conagra Brands has experienced pressure over time, with a 30 day share price return of 9.5% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 37.4%.
